categories.note: All from MktOff namespace (lines 2298-2345) plus the WndNotification hook (InstallMktVTableHook line 5039, MyHook_MktWndNotification line 4975). Window class = CMarketplaceWnd; vtable 0x009efaf8; ctor FUN_006ddb90. WndNotification = vtable slot 34.

items.description: Global holding &CMarketplaceWnd* (the active marketplace window instance). Read in TickMarketplace; null/visByte!=1 => closed.

items.description: CXWnd visible byte on the marketplace window (==1 when open).

WndNotification code for a grid tile (or sub-widget) being selected; drives selection + preview.
WndNotification code for Buy/Inspect button click activation.
When notify child is a sub-widget of a tile: parent = *(notify+0xc) - 0x10 to reach the tile container.

categories.note: Category-array on the window + the node builder. CreateCats/RenderCats are the native populate/render fns.

items.description: FUN_006dd260(wnd): native fn that builds the 3 stock category nodes (New & Featured / Player Studio / All Items). __fastcall(ecx=wnd).

items.description: FUN_006dcf40(wnd): native fn that renders category nodes; only renders nodes with +0x30 (NodeCount) > 0. __fastcall(ecx=wnd).
items.anchor: FnMktVoidWnd_t; called at end of MktPopulate; render gate = NodeCount

items.description: Category ArrayClass element count (struct start) on the marketplace window.
Category ArrayClass data pointer (array of node ptrs) on the window.
Category ArrayClass capacity (allocated slots). Code grows it to 24 via NodeAlloc.
FUN_008dbb3b(size) -> operator new; used to alloc category nodes (0x34), the bigger 24-slot cat array, and the 0x4c CTextureAnimation copy.
FUN_006e4a70(node,type,&dispCX,&intCX,parent,visible): category-node ctor; auto-links child into parent's child-array. __thiscall via __fastcall.
catNode -> internal-name CXStr* (the shown name). Used by MktRenameCategory.
Category node visible byte (set 1 by ctor arg).
Category node parent pointer (0 = top-level).
Category node child-array count (0 = leaf).
Category node item-count / render gate: RenderCats only renders when >0. Code sets =1 to show, =0 to hide a default.
*(window+0x25c) = selected category node (unreliable for custom nodes -> code reads the tree control instead).
Hard cap: MktAddBranch refuses to append when CatCount>=24; MktPopulate pre-grows to 24 slots.

categories.note: CXStr ctor + inline-text/length offsets used for in-place renaming and child-text setting.

items.description: FUN_00805c20(&out, cstr): constructs a CXStr (single rep ptr) from a C string. SAME address as Off::FnCxstrCtor.
items.anchor: FnMktCXStr_t; used everywhere a &CXStr arg is needed

items.description: CXStr length field (written by MktRenameCategory after editing inline text).
CXStr inline text buffer (chars). Code writes the new category name here in place.

categories.note: Tile creation + child-find + icon/text plumbing. Item-tile SIDL template id is build-specific.

items.description: *(window+0x384) = the item grid (CTileLayoutWnd) the tiles are made into.
*(0x015D3D08) = CSidlManager* (UI/SIDL manager). Used for TplResolve/MakeTile/AnimFind. SAME as Off::SidlMgrPtr.
FUN_0086e5e0(uiMgr, grid, tmpl): instantiate one item tile into the grid from a resolved template. Yields one tile per draw frame. __fastcall(ecx=uiMgr).
FUN_00870040(uiMgr, id): resolve a SIDL template by numeric id -> template ptr (fed to MakeTile). __fastcall(ecx=uiMgr).
SIDL template id of the item-tile template. BUILD-SPECIFIC SIDL id (re-derive per skin/build).
FUN_00868330(parent, &cxstr): find a named child control inside a window/tile. __fastcall(ecx=parent).
FUN_006d1c80(iconCtrl, icon): set the icon control's frame; internally subtracts 500 (frame = icon-500 within A_DragItem). __cdecl.
icon control -> CTextureAnimation* (the rendered atlas). Code points each tile's icon ctrl at its OWN copy.
FindAnimation(uiMgr, &CXStr 'A_DragItem') -> CTextureAnimation*. __fastcall(ecx=uiMgr).
items.anchor: FnMktAnimFind_t; src atlas for per-tile copy

items.description: CTextureAnimation ctor, run on a 0x4c-byte alloc. __fastcall(ecx=obj).
CTextureAnimation copy-init(dest, src). __fastcall(ecx=dest). Models the client's own FUN_006f4d20 pattern.
Byte size of a CTextureAnimation object (NodeAlloc(0x4c) before AnimCtor/AnimCopy).
Byte size of a category tree node (NodeAlloc(0x34) before NodeCtor).
Grid/tile child-list HEAD pointer (first child). Walked to enumerate tiles. Also tile+0x10 = name label (first child).
items.anchor: grid+0x10; tile+0x10 used as name label in selection highlight

items.description: CXWnd sibling 'next' link in the child list (grid tile enumeration).

categories.category: MktOff — CXWnd vtable slots & text color
categories.note: Vtable slot byte-offsets used to call SetWindowText / SetVisible / relayout, plus the name-label text-color field.

items.description: CXWnd vtable byte-offset for SetWindowText(&CXStr). Called as *(*(child)+0x124).
CXWnd vtable byte-offset for SetVisible(show, resize). =slot 54. Used to show/hide tiles + validated in MktTileLooksValid.
CTileLayoutWnd vtable byte-offset for relayout(0,0) (re-flow the grid).
Tile name-label ARGB text-color field. Code sets 0xFFFFD700 (gold) for selection, 0xFFFFFFFF (white) to clear.

categories.note: The visible category tree on the window; read each frame to detect the selected leaf + its parent branch. Branch/Leaf node vtables are build-specific and used to classify lines.

items.description: *(window+0x3b4) = CTreeViewWnd (the category tree control).
CTreeViewWnd visible line count.
CTreeViewWnd visible-line array base.
CTreeViewWnd selected-line index (-1 = none).
Per-line struct stride in the visible-line array.
Tree line struct -> tree-item node ptr.
Leaf tree-item node -> label char* (C string). Leaves use +0x14.
Branch (folder) tree-item node -> label char* (C string). Branches use +0x18, leaves +0x14.
CTreeViewNode LEAF vtable pointer; *(node)==LeafVtable identifies a selectable leaf.
CTreeViewNode BRANCH (folder) vtable pointer; *(node)==BranchVtable identifies a parent folder line.

categories.note: String anchors for finding tile + window child controls via FindChild — these are the cross-build identifiers (names are stable across skins where present). From MktFillOneTile / TickMarketplace / hooks.

items.description: Tile item-name label; also the ready-gate (absent => tile children not built yet, retry).
Tile price label.
Tile icon control (CTextureAnimation host at +0x228).
Shared item-icon texture-atlas animation; per-tile copy gives each its own frame.
Native Buy button; force-enabled each frame (+0x1a=1); click (code 1) => '#mktbuy <id>'.
General-tab Inspect button; force-enabled; click => '#mktview <id>' (server ItemPacketViewLink).
Funds balance number; morphed to the category currency balance.
Detail-pane item name set on tile select.
Detail-pane description/stat-line text set from MktItem.desc.
Detail-pane price text set from MktItem.price.

From MKPW_AvailableFundsUpper: parent=*(num+0xc)-0x10; funds 'Current Funds' label = *(parent+0x10) (first child).
CXWnd enabled byte; set 1 each frame on Buy/Inspect to keep them clickable.

categories.note: Off:: symbols the Mkt preview path uses. Paper-doll + actor rebuild + globals. Image base 0x400000.

items.description: FUN_00576ca0(viewport): clones the local player (source = GblPreviewSubject) into the viewport on a fresh actor (char-window paper-doll). __thiscall(ecx=viewport); RET 4 (one ignored stack arg).
items.anchor: MktPaperDollFn; paperDoll(vp,0); clone read at vp+0x1e0

items.description: FUN_005768c0(viewport, sourceSpawn, charFrame): viewport SetModel; clones source actor into the preview region. __thiscall. (Earlier path; superseded by FnPaperDollPreview but resolver retained.)
FUN_005923f0(clone, slot, 'ITxxxx', 0, 1): set one held-weapon model by idfile string; render-only on a clone (net path gated to local player). __thiscall.
items.anchor: MktSetWeaponFn; overlay weapon ornament on clone

items.description: FUN_00596b20(spawn, appearanceData, flag): apply appearance-data struct + rebuild actor (calls CreatePlayerActor + per-slot armor loop). NOT used in the shipped preview (AVs on null struct); resolver retained.
items.anchor: MktApplyFn; data+0x64 equip array (9x5), +0x140 apply flag

items.description: CDisplay::CreatePlayerActor(cd, entity, p2, 1, 2, p5, 1): rebuilds a spawn's render actor. __thiscall, 6 stack args, RET 0x18. p5 MUST be literal (uint*)1.
FUN_00490a10(CDisplay, oldActor): reap the replaced old actor from the world render scene (anti-ghost). Call after each CreatePlayerActor when actor ptr changed. __thiscall.
*(0x00DD2630) = current preview-subject spawn = the local player. Source for the paper-doll clone + the slot pokes.
*(0x00DD2660) = CDisplay singleton ptr (cd arg to CreatePlayerActor + the actor reap).
*(0x015D46A4) = EQGraphicsDX9 render-engine object ptr; its vtable (in EQGraphicsDX9.dll) holds the preview-region methods. Resolver retained (struct-rebuild path not shipped).

categories.category: Marketplace 3D preview — struct offsets on player/spawn & viewport
categories.note: Equip arrays, tint array, actor ptr, viewport clone ptr — all poked by MktRenderClone / MktRenderCloneBareRebuild / MktShowPreview.

items.description: *(CMarketplaceWnd+0x4cc) = the built 3D preview viewport object (fed to the paper-doll).
Spawn equipment array: 9 slots x 0x14 bytes (5 ints). int[0]=Material/ModelId. Slot poked = +0xf30 + slot*0x14.
items.anchor: player+0xf30 + s*0x14 + i*4; slot int0 = material/model

items.description: Parallel copy of the 9x0x14 equipment array (FUN_00596b20 writes both); preview pokes both.
9-DWORD per-slot armor TINT array (0xAARRGGBB). FUN_005a4360 returns *(spawn+0xefc+slot*4); fed to FUN_00594E50. Poke +0xefc+slot*4 for color preview.
items.anchor: player+0xefc + s*4; tint, NOT equip int[4]

items.description: Spawn -> render actor pointer. Read before/after CreatePlayerActor to detect change (reap gate); clone's actor likewise.
After paper-doll, *(viewport+0x1e0) = the preview clone spawn; PreviewApply repaints its slots.
Render slot 1 (chest) int0 = +0xf30 + 1*0x14 = +0xf44; 10..16 => a robe is equipped (robe-hint gate).
Chest material values 10-16 denote a full-body robe model (drives the robe bare-rebuild + hint).
Exact arg pattern; p5 = literal (uint*)1 sentinel (NOT &localVar) or rebuild no-ops and clones leak.
Slot bitmasks (bits 0-6 = head/chest/arms/wrists/hands/legs/feet) for full-suit (ps9) and robe (ps1) bare-rebuild + repaint.
Preview equip-slot index: 0 head,1 chest,2 arms,3 wrists,4 hands,5 legs,6 feet,7 primary,8 secondary; 9 = full armor suit (special).

categories.category: EQGraphicsDX9.dll preview engine vtable (RVAs, image base 0x10000000)

Render region (viewport Draw slot 3 calls this with centerX,centerY,halfW,halfH,mode). FUN_10086240.
Set region rect + mode flag (FUN_576070 calls this; mode from viewport+0x1d8). FUN_10086270.
Sets global DAT_10179110+0xbc (mode push/pop around SetModel in FUN_005768c0). FUN_100862a0.
Set vec3 (light/cam pos via FUN_100b85a0). FUN_100862c0.
Setter (byte). FUN_10086310.
Last preview-region method (vtable ends ~+0x138). FUN_10086330.
SetPreviewModel helper: stores renderable at slot+4; reads bbox via renderable vtbl+0x70/+0x74; light at slot+0x14, scene node at slot+0x18.
items.anchor: called by RVA 0x861f0; modelObj->vtbl+0xb8 renderable, +0x254 node

items.description: CXStr::CXStr(this, char* src) from a literal. Same address as MktOff::CXStrCtor; used by PopulateTimeCombo/SetWidgetText/list helpers.
CXStr::c_str() -> const char*. Reads typed bid text; available to Mkt text reads.
*DAT_015D3D08 = CSidlManager*. SAME as MktOff::UiMgr; used by both node-fight + marketplace tile factory.
CComboWnd::InsertChoice(list,&CXStr,width,0,flags). Used by PopulateTimeCombo (node-fight, shares the Mkt helper region).
CListWnd deselect-all (NOT a truncate). Node-fight listbox helper alongside Mkt code.
CListWnd::AddString(list,&name,color,id,0,NULL)->row. Listbox helper.
CListWnd::SetItemText(list,row,col,&text). Listbox helper.
CChatManager::SendChatMessage; backs SendServerCommand used by Buy ('#mktbuy')/Inspect ('#mktview')/catalog request ('#mkt').
*DAT_00E67CCC = CChatManager singleton (target of FnChatSend).
CEverQuest::dsp_chat(this,text,color,echo,brackets): free-form chat print; preview robe hint uses g_orig_DspChat (trampoline of this).

FUN_00594E50: per-slot armor apply+repaint primitive. ArmorOrn::PreviewApply/RefreshWornSlot call the trampoline g_orig of this to repaint the preview clone's slots. __thiscall, prologue 6A FF 68; 9 args.
GetItem(container,&out,wornSlot): worn-item walk used by ArmorOrn (shared with preview RefreshWornSlot).
*(0x00DD261C) = local PC base for the worn-item walk (ArmorOrn). Distinct from GblPreviewSubject.
For a PC spawn returns *(spawn+0xefc+slot*4); the value FUN_00594E50 uses as the slot color. Documents why the preview pokes +0xefc (not equip int[4]).
items.anchor: comment in MktRenderClone: 'FUN_005a4360 feeds to FUN_00594E50'

categories.note: Cache/array sizing constants — not addresses but build-tuning the porter must match to the feed.

items.description: Catalog cache size; parse guard derives from sizeof. Was 800->2000->4000 (840 armor ornaments pushed catalog to 2141). Must exceed total catalog rows or last parent's tiles vanish.
Per-leaf view array size (max tiles considered for one category).
Max tiles materialized per leaf (grid scrolls beyond what fits); also sizes per-tile icon-anim array.
Server feed row format parsed by ParseBozMkt; trailing model|pslot|color drive the 3D preview (color hex 0xAARRGGBB, default 0xFF000000).
